channel.title: Gpu on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Gpu on Pi Stack

item.title: Best Self-Hosted GPU Monitoring Tools 2026: nvtop vs DCGM Exporter vs Netdata
item.description: If you run a self-hosted server with a GPU — whether for Jellyfin hardware transcoding, machine learning workloads, game servers, or cryptocurrency mining — you need visibility into GPU utilization, memory usage, temperature, and power draw. Without proper monitoring, a runaway process can silently consume all VRAM, thermal throttling can cripple performance, and hardware failures can go unnoticed until it’s too late.
